run: case "$*" in *"cat .env"*|*"less .env"*|*"head .env"*|*"tail .env"*) echo 'BLOCKED: Reading .env directly — use grep on specific keys'; exit 1;; esac
description: Block direct reads of .env file to prevent secret exposure

run: if [[ "$*" == "git push origin main" && -z "${CI:-}" ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Direct push to main outside CI. Open a PR instead.'; exit 1; fi
description: Prevent direct pushes to main outside CI

run: if [[ "$*" == *uvicorn* && "$*" != *"--reload"* ]]; then echo 'CAUTION: Running uvicorn without --reload'; fi
description: Warn when running uvicorn without reload mode
